description: Track what AI applied automatically, what needs review, and where wiki content changed recently.

metrics.autoAppliedDetail: Applied by AI in the last 24 hours
metrics.failedDetail: Classifier or patch jobs needing attention

pending.title: Review needed
pending.emptyBody: Suggestions and low-confidence ingestions will appear here.

autoApplied.title: Recently auto-applied
autoApplied.emptyTitle: No automatic changes in the last 24 hours
autoApplied.emptyBody: High-confidence ingestions will appear here after they update a draft.
